title: Pink Passion GUI
description: Ignite your passion for pink with this striking and bold GUI resource pack
body:
![cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/417fa99347dc64d8d69b374245402ef01cdd4a61_0.webp)

## Description

**Pink Passion GUI** is my personal take on giving Minecraft a fresh, vibrant look by recoloring the entire GUI in beautiful shades of pink. This resource pack doesn’t alter the game’s textures or models—it focuses purely on transforming the interface into a pink paradise. Whether you're crafting, battling, or just exploring, every menu and button is now bathed in soft, radiant pink.

This pack is perfect for players who love a more playful, eye-catching aesthetic. It’s a simple yet bold way to enhance your game’s visuals without altering the core experience.

Everything in this pack was colored by me, with no borrowed elements or textures. If you're a fan of pink-themed packs, I encourage you to explore other creators' unique takes on pink GUIs, as many have done them beautifuly (shout-out YumItsPizza and ItsPinkuuu)!

## Future plans

I’m working on adding support for more MC versions and popular mods by recoloring their GUIs to match the pink theme. Join the Discord server if you have any suggestions or bug reports and stay tuned for updates!

### P.S

I don't own original textures. This resource pack is just a recolor of original ones.
Please, do NOT upload this anywhere and/or claim this as your own work.
You CAN reuse textures from this resource pack but please give credit to the original author.
